note: Log real observations here - busting fish, bait balls, working birds, or recent catches. A recent entry within 15 km and 3 days boosts nearby spots' scores and is drawn on the map. Your other repo can append to this file to feed live intel. Set "example": true on rows the scorer should ignore.

sightings.note: EXAMPLE ROW - replace with your own. Dawn surface busts on anchovy off Tabarja.
